titleStmt.title: SII 18.249: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 249. (B.K. No. 84 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: North-east pillar in the navaraṅga in the temple of Siddhēśvar.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Mahadēva is dated in Śaka 1187, Krōdhana, Jyēshṭha ba. 1, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1265, June 31, Sunday, f.d.t. ·52.

It states that Baicharasa, son of Suṁkādhikāri Kallarasa of Vijayāpura made a grant of toll-incomes of the sthaḷas of god Siddhanāthadēva of the agrahāra of Hāvēri for burning perpetual lamps to the god. The grant was made at the instance of Samastadēśādhipati Dēhārada Mādarasa who was the agent of Mahāpradhāna Dēvarasa of Toṟagale, a subordinate of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷaprauḍhapratāpacakra
varti śrīmahadēvarāyarājyōdayē tatupādapadumō
pajīvi śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ sarbbādhikāri toṟagaleyadēvarsa
ra rājyabharabhāranistārakaṁ samastadēśādhipati dēhārada mādarasara
nirūpadiṁ śrīmatu suṁkādhikāri vijayāpurada sthaḷavri
ttiya kallarasara maga baicarasaru svasti śakavaruṣaṁ 1187 ne
ya krōdhanasaṁvatsada jyēṣṭha ba 1 Ādityavāradaṁdu śrī
madanādiya piriyagrahāraṁ hāvēri śrīsvayaṁbhu
siddhanāthadēvara sthaḷaṁgaḷu suṁkakke prativaruṣavu piṁḍaḷige
yāgi tiṟuvartthavanu yā siddhanāthadēvarige yakhaṁḍadīptiga
ḷa naḍasuvaṁtāgi dhārāporbbakaṁ Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyi
yāgi koṭṭaru yī dharmmamaṁ Ārasugaḷū mahājanaṁgaḷū
pratipāḷisuvaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī . svadattaṁ parada
ttaṁ vā yō dharmmaṁ haratē naraḥ ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . ©
Digital edition of SII 18.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
